title: UCB1 instance-dependent regret bound
setting: Derive the instance-dependent regret bound for UCB1: R_T <= sum_{i: Delta_i > 0} (8 log T / Delta_i) + (1 + pi^2/3) * sum_i Delta_i
known_results: UCB1 uses confidence bound sqrt(2 log t / n_i)
Regret decomposition: R_T = sum_i Delta_i * E[N_i(T)]

title: UCB1 instance-independent (minimax) regret bound
setting: Derive the minimax regret bound: R_T <= sqrt(2KT log T) + K/2

title: Lai-Robbins asymptotic lower bound
setting: Show that any consistent policy satisfies lim inf R_T / log T >= sum_{i: Delta_i > 0} Delta_i / KL(mu_i, mu*)
known_results: Change of measure / KL divergence argument
